title: Ingenuity Takes Flight on Mars
story: A tiny helicopter named Ingenuity made history in 2021. On April 19, this plucky drone became the first powered aircraft to fly on another planet! This groundbreaking flight proved that exploring Mars by air is possible, opening up exciting new ways to study the Red Planet.
